title: Find Domain SID
html:
Find Domain SID

You can find the domain SID using function --get-sid

nxc ldap <dc-ip> -u <username> -p <password> -k --get-sid
LDAP        <dc-ip>  389    <dc-ip>   [*]  x64 (name:<dc-ip>) (domain:<domain>) (signing:True) (SMBv1:False)
LDAPS       <dc-ip>  636    <dc-ip>   [+] <domain>\<username>
LDAPS       <dc-ip>  636    <dc-ip>   Domain SID S-1-5-21-2743207045-1827831105-2542523200
